summary: The diff only shows metadata changes to project_state.json documenting the analytics review task. No actual implementation changes were made to frontend/index.html or any analytics tracking code. All three requirements (REQ-1, REQ-2, REQ-3) remain unimplemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Verify that Google Analytics tracking code is properly installed in the frontend HTML with correct GA4 tracking ID format (G-XXXXXXXXXX)
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to frontend/index.html or any HTML files. The tracking code installation/verification has not been performed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure the tracking implementation includes the full HTTPS URL format for the Internet Computer deployment domain
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to any analytics configuration or tracking code. The URL format requirement has not been addressed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Verify that no user-visible UI elements or functionality are affected by the Analytics implementation review
missing_requirements.reason: While no UI changes were made (which is correct), this requirement expects verification documentation as part of the review process, which is not present in the diff.
